project: a daily generative art practice, after Zach Lieberman
batch_note: Argentina at the Mundial 2026 — one piece per match.

sketches.title: Terreno
sketches.subject: Argentina vs. Algeria
sketches.note: Match pressure surveyed as terrain: bone-white contours on the dark room, drawn once. Messi's hat-trick is the three summits.

sketches.title: Sismógrafo
sketches.subject: Argentina vs. Austria
sketches.note: A plotter's seismogram of the match, one tremor per minute; the record run deep into stoppage.

sketches.title: Resonancia
sketches.subject: Jordan vs. Argentina
sketches.note: A plate vibrated through four Chladni resonances, one per goal; each leaves its residue of sand.

sketches.title: Bronce
sketches.subject: Argentina vs. Cabo Verde
sketches.note: A commemorative plaque, sand-cast in bronze; one raking lamp settles, the patina keeps the score.
